prompt: A flashy Japanese romantic comedy movie poster in a cute-but-dramatic pop anime mascot style, designed like a theatrical film teaser. Center the composition on a full-body cartoon bunny girl mascot named パン子, with a large white face, black body and one black ear, one bright red ear, thick black outline, half-lidded glamorous eyes with long lashes, pink blush circles on her cheeks, a tiny red nose, a small tongue peeking out, and a pink bow with white polka dots on top of her head. She wears a sleeveless pink dress with white polka dots and a black scarf-like neck detail, posing with one hand near her cheek in a confident, slightly flirty stance. The background is a dreamy sunset waterfront city skyline with golden reflections on the water, pastel pink-orange-blue sky, sparkles, soft bokeh, and a ferris wheel on the left. Place 2 male silhouette figures in the midground, one on the left standing casually and one on the right in a suit-like pose, suggesting potential love interests. Add lush tropical flowers and leaves around the borders, especially pink hibiscus blossoms in the corners, plus floating hearts and glitter effects throughout. Use a bold, layered Japanese poster layout packed with decorative typography and stickers. At the top, handwritten-style Japanese text reads: 「笑って、泣いて、恋をして。アラサーの私、まだまだ諦めない！」 with pink emphasis and doodled heart lines. On the upper left, include a bright pink scalloped badge that says 「2026年 夏公開」. Along the right side, place vertical Japanese text: 「私の幸せ、探しにいきます。」. Near the lower left, add a pink ribbon label reading 「劇場版！」. Across the bottom center, create the large main title in bold decorative Japanese lettering: 「アラサー パン子の 婚活奮闘記」 with pink and dark navy text, white outlines, and a cute heart accent. Beneath it, add a pink slogan banner with yellow-highlighted text: 「恋に迷って、人生はもっとキラキラする♥」. Include small faux credits at the bottom in Japanese film-poster style. Around the lower area, place 4 small polaroid-style inset snapshots of the bunny character: 2 on the lower left and 2 on the lower right, each showing different cute situations such as a close-up pose, sitting at a cafe table, wearing sunglasses, or posing outdoors. Add a small notebook page labeled "Today's Mission" with checklist hearts in the lower left, and a plastic iced drink cup with straw plus sunglasses in the lower right. Overall feeling: feminine, comedic, inspirational, sparkly, over-the-top, and nostalgic, like a parody of a live-action romance film poster starring a mascot heroine. Use vivid pinks, peach sunset tones, sky blue, white, and navy, with glossy highlights and a polished promotional-poster finish.
